default_binding.H2_ELDER_DETAIL: leaning on her cane, spines silvered by age
default_binding.H2_LEGEND: the tale of the very first lantern

slots.meaning: The child protagonist gathering supplies for the festival.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable young woodland creature; capable, warm, and never worried.

slots.meaning: The hero's species, named once at the story's opening.
slots.guidance: A gentle, kid-relatable creature type; benign, never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: The hero's cozy home base, returned to between every gathering trip.
slots.guidance: A warm, safe, welcoming little dwelling; always reachable, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The name of the celebration the hero is gathering supplies for.
slots.guidance: A warm, communal, joyful seasonal gathering; wonder over dread.

slots.meaning: The open gathering place where the celebration is held.
slots.guidance: A safe, welcoming open space that everything converges on; no hazards.

slots.meaning: The tall, central fixture of the venue where decorations are hung.
slots.guidance: A grand, climbable-by-adults-only or safely-reachable landmark; purely decorative peril-free backdrop.

slots.meaning: The calm body of water at the venue used for the finale.
slots.guidance: Still, shallow-feeling, and safe; never a drowning or falling-in hazard.

slots.meaning: The glowing gathered material used to light the festival decorations.
slots.guidance: A soft, warm, harmless natural glow; a keepsake, not a hazard.

slots.meaning: The central decorative object of the festival (used singular and pluralized with a trailing 's').
slots.guidance: A small, warm, handheld light-holder; the story's title object; never a fire hazard.

slots.meaning: The traditional song sung at the festival's climax.
slots.guidance: A cheerful, communal, easy-to-join song; lower-case reference (contrast with FINALE_SONG_TITLE).

slots.meaning: Where the hero gathers the glowing light-source material.
slots.guidance: A safe, sunlit foraging spot; nothing sharp or dangerous.

slots.meaning: The tempting, harder-to-reach cluster of the gathered material.
slots.guidance: A minor stretch, not a real fall risk; the story's comic-mishap trigger.

slots.meaning: The soft place the bounced basket lands in the comic setback.
slots.guidance: Soft, harmless, faintly silly landing spot; nobody is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: Where the hero's friends are found and invited.
slots.guidance: A cozy communal dwelling or gathering spot for friends.

slots.meaning: The loud, comically wrong way to wake and invite the friends.
slots.guidance: Harmlessly too-loud; a noisy comic overcorrection, never harmful.

slots.meaning: Where the hero gathers stalks to weave into decoration frames.
slots.guidance: A calm, shallow waterside spot; safe footing throughout.

slots.meaning: The raw plant material cut and bent into decoration frames.
slots.guidance: A simple, bendable, harmless plant stalk.

slots.meaning: Where the hero asks a helper creature for festival food.
slots.guidance: A cozy, buzzing communal dwelling; welcoming, not swarming or threatening.

slots.meaning: The helper creatures who prepare the festival food.
slots.guidance: A kindly, cooperative group of small creatures; never a stinging or biting threat.

slots.meaning: The sweet festival food the helper creatures prepare.
slots.guidance: A warm, simple, shareable festival treat.

slots.meaning: Where last year's decorations are stored and reclaimed.
slots.guidance: A small, dusty, unthreatening storage spot.

slots.meaning: Last year's reclaimed decorations, dusted off for reuse.
slots.guidance: Old but intact, decorative, and safe to handle.

slots.meaning: Where the hero asks the musicians to play at the festival.
slots.guidance: An open, sunny spot associated with the musician creatures.

slots.meaning: The small musicians who play at the festival's climax.
slots.guidance: A cheerful, harmless group of small musical creatures.

slots.meaning: The elder who tells the festival's origin story on the picnic branch.
slots.guidance: A warm, gentle, respected elder; storyteller, never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The elder's gentle physical appearance detail on arrival.
slots.guidance: Warm, age-marked, harmless physical detail; affectionate, not frail-as-peril.

slots.meaning: The traditional origin story the elder tells about the festival.
slots.guidance: A short, warm, benign legend name; no frightening content implied.

slots.meaning: The playful word-game the friends play during the picnic (singular; pluralized with a trailing 's').
slots.guidance: A light, silly, inclusive party game.

slots.meaning: Ending: the comic berry-gathering setback. Names ending end_berry_oops.
slots.guidance: Light, comic, reassuring setback title; nobody is hurt.

slots.meaning: Ending: the comic too-loud-invitation setback. Names ending end_willow_oops.
slots.guidance: Light, comic, reassuring setback title; nobody is hurt.

slots.meaning: Ending: the comic wrong-material setback. Names ending end_reed_oops.
slots.guidance: Light, comic, reassuring setback title; nobody is hurt.

slots.meaning: Ending: floating the decorations on the water (success). Names ending end_finale_pond.
slots.guidance: Positive, gentle, wondrous completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: hanging the decorations in the landmark tree (success). Names ending end_finale_oak.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, celebratory completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: singing the traditional song together (completion). Names ending end_finale_song.
slots.guidance: Positive, joyful, musical completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: making a wish together (success). Names ending end_finale_wish.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, communal completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: sharing the festival feast (success). Names ending end_finale_feast.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, communal-meal completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: the best riddle of the night (success). Names ending end_finale_riddle.
slots.guidance: Positive, playful, funny completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: hearing the elder's origin story (completion). Names ending end_finale_story.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, tradition-honoring completion title.
